name: Shrimp & Crab Spaghetti
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil in a large pan over medium heat. Add onions and garlic; brown until soft.
2. Stir in tomato paste, basil, salt, butter, crabs, and minced garlic. Cook for 5 minutes.
3. Open the cans of tomato sauce and stir into the crab mixture. Bring to a simmer.
4. Reduce heat to low. Add shrimp and cook until heated through, about 10 minutes.
5. Stir in chili powder, sugar, and pepper. Simmer another 10 minutes.
6. Cook spaghetti according to package instructions until al dente. Drain well.
7. Divide pasta among serving dishes. Top with crab mixture and reserved sauce.
8. Serve immediately, stirring gently before eating to combine all ingredients.
